title: ジュニアカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Junior Cup. Our success here is
essential if we want to move on to the coveted
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan, determined to discard her naivety
and become stronger, heads into the race.
